jobTitle: Senior Data Analyst & Diaspora Economics Specialist
summary:
Data-driven economist with 8+ years of experience in remittance flow analysis, diaspora investment trends, and geospatial visualization. 
                Expertise in policy advisory, economic modeling, and data storytelling. Published research on Kenya’s diaspora remittance corridors.
                Passionate about leveraging open data and GitHub-backed CMS (Mavo) for transparent analytics.

workExperiences.company: Central Bank of Kenya – Research Dept
workExperiences.description: • Lead remittance data modeling, forecasting inflows from 6 regions (North America, Europe, Middle East, etc.)
• Built ATS-friendly reporting frameworks for migration and remittance surveys (N=10ghhjj
• Researched diaspora savings and investment products, delivering quarterly remittance trend reports.

educations.eduDescription: Thesis: "Remittance flows and household welfare in Kenya" – Distinction. Coursework: Econometrics, GIS, Development Finance.

educations.institution: University of Nairobi, Upper Second Class
educations.eduDescription: Minor in Statistics; President of Economics Students' Association.
